name: Golf Code 360 Studio Pasadena
about: GolfCode360 Studio Pasadena is an indoor golf training facility focused on biomechanics and physics-based instruction. The studio offers a formal education on repeatable swing techniques suitable for both amateur and professional golfers. Utilizing advanced technology including launch monitors, 3D motion capture, and video analysis software, the facility provides a comprehensive learning environment. With locations in Brea and Irvine, the studio aims to help golfers of all levels improve their game quickly through its revolutionary approach and state-of-the-art equipment.
why_golfers_like_it: Revolutionary biomechanics and physics-based swing instruction
Access to latest video analysis software and launch monitors
3D motion capture and high-speed cameras for detailed feedback
Innovative approach creating repeatable high-level swings
Focus on fast improvement for golfers of all skill levels

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: While the facility provides club rentals, it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the most accurate fitting and instruction.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drinks are permitted as the facility doesn't have a kitchen or bar service.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: A full 18-hole simulation typically takes approximately 1.5 to 2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The studio welcomes golfers of all levels including juniors, though specific children's programs aren't mentioned.
